author: ifq.ai
description: IFQ Design Skills · built-in HTML templates. Each entry points to a self-contained HTML scaffold with the IFQ brand already wired in. Agents should Read the template before generating, then fork-and-fill (not blank-start).

templates.name: Editorial Hero Landing
templates.notes: Newsreader display + rust accent + right-side IfqSpark. Best for product launch landing / personal branding.

templates.name: Keynote Title Slide
templates.notes: Single title slide with IfqStamp + speaker-attribution band. Pair with slide-body + slide-closing.

templates.name: Command Center Dashboard
templates.notes: Left nav + top KPI strip + 3×3 metric grid + right feed. Uses hand-drawn radar/arrow icons for status.

templates.name: Vertical Infographic (小红书长图)
templates.notes: Multi-section scroll with timeline + pull-quotes + colophon. IfqStamp at footer.

templates.name: X/Twitter Share Card
templates.notes: OG-ready share card with large headline + rust accent rule.

templates.name: A vs B Comparison Matrix
templates.notes: Two-column matrix with radar chart footer. Ready for benchmark data.

templates.name: Changelog Timeline
templates.notes: Left-rail dates + right event cards + hand-drawn icons.

templates.name: Business Card (90×54mm + 3mm bleed)
templates.notes: Print-ready with bleed & safe-zone marks. Front + back.
